message:
🐛 Fix Cmd+/- font size shortcuts blocked by xterm key handler (#193)

The xterm attachCustomKeyEventHandler returned true (let xterm process)
for Cmd+=/+/-/0, so xterm consumed the events before the window keydown
handler could trigger setGlobalFontSize. Return false for these keys so
they bypass xterm and reach the font size handler.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
